calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jul-14-2023 Vacated

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Dec-28-2022 Continued To Aug-14-23 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION .
Off Calendar Jan-13-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances (by Zoom):
Paul Allen Peters, Esq. (415) 949-1900 ARMSTRONG & ROWLAND, LLP for Plaintiff.
Daniel Olsen, Esq. 925-984-8113 Clapp Moroney Vicinich Beeman & Scheley for Defendant.
Court reporter: Cesar Rodriquez, CSR #13269, 909-210-2171, csrodriguez1@msn.com.

RULING - A R G U E D. Mr. Olsen argues indemnity provision. Mr. Peters responds. The Court inquires if there is any error on the cites in the tentative ruling. Both sides argue. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PLAINTIFF BANK OF AMERICA N.A.'s MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION.

Taken Under Submission.*** (as fully reported in the reporter's notes/transcript)

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M. Goodman, Court reporter: Cesar Rodriquez, CSR #13269, 909-210-2171, csrodriguez1@msn.com.

***After the hearing, the Court signs the order RE: BANK OF AMERICA N.A.'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION REGARDING THE DUTY TO DEFEND AGAINST DEFENDANT JONES LANG LASALLE AMERICAS, INC.***

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-09-2022 Set For Trial On Feb-14-23 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
